noticias.titulo: TSX advances as investors weigh positive U.S. jobs data against Middle East fears
noticias.resumen: Investing.com -- Canada’s primary stock index rose on Friday as market participants balanced a robust U.S. labor report against renewed military activity in the Strait of Hormuz. The S&P/TSX Composite index climbed 172.59 points, or 0.51%, to 34,029.
